stemHtml: When "spoilers" are used as speed brakes:

options.a: at the same angle of attack, C<sub>D</sub> is increased and C<sub>L</sub> is decreased.
options.b: at the same angle of attack, C<sub>L</sub> remains unaffected.
options.d: for the same C<sub>L</sub>, the angle of attack must be reduced.
